result.markdown:
# Regression assumes causality ✎ Very rough draft ## Dependencies ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(tidyr) library(dplyr) library(purrr) library(parameters) library(lavaan) library(semPlot) ``` ::: ## Functions ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} generate_data <- function(n, population_model) { data <- lavaan::simulateData(model = population_model, sample.nobs = n) return(data) } analyse <- function(data, model) { # specify and fit model fit <- sem(model = model, data = data) #fit <- lm(formula = mode, data = data) # extract regression beta estimates results <- parameters::model_parameters(fit, standardize = FALSE) |> filter(To == "Y" & From == "X") |> # this corresponds to the Y ~ X effect select(beta = Coefficient, ci_lower = CI_low, ci_upper = CI_high, p) return(results) } plots_causal <- function(model){ generate_data(n = 300, population_model = model) %>% sem(model = model, data = .) |> semPaths(whatLabels = "diagram", layout = layout_matrix, residuals = FALSE, edge.label.cex = 1.2, sizeMan = 10) } ``` ::: ## Does regression assume causality? ### Plots Simple regression: X causes Y ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # simple regression layout_matrix <- matrix(c( 1, 0, -1, 0), ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE) plots_causal("Y ~ 0.5*X") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](causality_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-4-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: Simple regression: Y causes X ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # simple regression layout_matrix <- matrix(c(-1, 0, 1, 0), ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE) plots_causal("X ~ 0.5*Y") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](causality_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-5-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ### Run simulation ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} experiment_parameters_grid <- expand_grid( n = 200, population_model = c("Y ~ 0.5*X", "X ~ 0.5*Y"), analyse_model = "Y ~ X", iteration = 1:1000 ) set.seed(42) simulation <- # using the experiment parameters... experiment_parameters_grid |> # ...generate data... mutate(generated_data = pmap(list(n = n, population_model = population_model), generate_data)) |> # ...analyze data mutate(results = pmap(list(data = generated_data, model = analyse_model), analyse)) ``` ::: ### Summarize results ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} simulation_summary <- simulation |> unnest(results) |> group_by(n, population_model, analyse_model) |> summarize(mean_beta = mean(beta), proportion_signficiant = mean(p < .05)) simulation_summary |> mutate_if(is.numeric, janitor::round_half_up, digits = 2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display}
| n|population_model |analyse_model | mean_beta| proportion_signficiant| |---:|:----------------|:-------------|---------:|----------------------:| | 200|X ~ 0.5*Y |Y ~ X | 0.4| 1| | 200|Y ~ 0.5*X |Y ~ X | 0.5| 1|
::: ::: ## Collider ### Plots Covariate is a confounder: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} layout_matrix <- matrix(c( 1, 0, -1, 0, 0, 1), ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE) plots_causal("Y ~ 0.0*X + 0.5*C; X ~ 0.5*C") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](causality_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-8-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: Confounder is a collider: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} layout_matrix <- matrix(c( 0, 1, 1, 0, -1, 0), ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE) plots_causal("C ~ 0.5*X + 0.5*Y; Y ~ 0.0*X") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](causality_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-9-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ### Run simulation ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} experiment_parameters_grid <- expand_grid( n = 200, population_model = c("Y ~ 0.5*X + 0.0*C", "C ~ 0.5*X + 0.5*Y; Y ~~ 0.0*X"), analyse_model = "Y ~ X + C", iteration = 1:1000 ) set.seed(42) simulation <- # using the experiment parameters... experiment_parameters_grid |> # ...generate data... mutate(generated_data = pmap(list(n = n, population_model = population_model), generate_data)) |> # ...analyze data mutate(results = pmap(list(data = generated_data, model = analyse_model), analyse)) ``` ::: ### Summarize results ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} simulation_summary <- simulation |> unnest(results) |> group_by(n, population_model, analyse_model) |> summarize(mean_beta = mean(beta), proportion_signficiant = mean(p < .05)) simulation_summary |> mutate_if(is.numeric, janitor::round_half_up, digits = 2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display}
| n|population_model |analyse_model | mean_beta| proportion_signficiant| |---:|:-----------------------------|:-------------|---------:|----------------------:| | 200|C ~ 0.5*X + 0.5*Y; Y ~~ 0.0*X |Y ~ X + C | -0.2| 0.82| | 200|Y ~ 0.5*X + 0.0*C |Y ~ X + C | 0.5| 1.00|
::: :::
